text:
[
  {
    "thinking": "I am identifying the initial state of the screen at the start of the recording. The user is on the Askable dashboard, specifically the 'Studies' page, which displays a table of existing research studies.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 0,
    "time_end_ms": 0,
    "description": "Initial screen state: Askable dashboard showing a list of studies in a table format.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "page_title": "Studies | Askable",
    "page_location": "https://app.askable.com/studies",
    "frame_description": "The Askable dashboard is visible with a sidebar on the left and a main table listing various studies with columns for Title, Type, Status, Quota, and dates."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user moves the cursor to the top right of the content area and clicks the '+ Create' button to initiate the creation of a new study.",
    "type": "click",
    "time_start_ms": 46500,
    "time_end_ms": 46500,
    "description": "User clicks the '+ Create' button.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "interaction_target": "+ Create",
    "page_title": "Studies | Askable",
    "page_location": "https://app.askable.com/studies",
    "frame_description": "The cursor is positioned over the '+ Create' button in the top right corner of the studies list."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "Immediately after clicking the create button, a dropdown menu appears presenting various study types for the user to choose from.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 46600,
    "time_end_ms": 46800,
    "description": "A dropdown menu appears showing different study types like 'Interview study', 'Unmoderated study', and 'Participant recruitment'.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "frame_description": "A menu has opened below the '+ Create' button, listing several research study options."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user moves the cursor over the 'Interview study' option in the newly opened menu and pauses there for several seconds, likely reading the description or considering the choice.",
    "type": "hover",
    "time_start_ms": 48400,
    "time_end_ms": 52700,
    "description": "User hovers over the 'Interview study' option in the dropdown menu.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "interaction_target": "Interview study",
    "frame_description": "The cursor is stationary over the 'Interview study' item in the dropdown menu."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user clicks on the 'Interview study' option to proceed with creating that specific type of study.",
    "type": "click",
    "time_start_ms": 52700,
    "time_end_ms": 52700,
    "description": "User clicks on 'Interview study'.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "interaction_target": "Interview study",
    "frame_description": "The 'Interview study' menu item is highlighted as the user clicks it."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "Following the selection of the study type, the application begins loading the study setup page.",
    "type": "navigate",
    "time_start_ms": 52800,
    "time_end_ms": 53600,
    "description": "Page navigates to the study setup screen.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "page_location": "https://app.askable.com/booking-setup/create?research-type=remote-call",
    "frame_description": "The screen transitions from the studies list to a new form-based page for study setup."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user interacts with the 'Study title' input field, which is pre-populated with a default name. The user clicks and drags to select the existing text.",
    "type": "click",
    "time_start_ms": 56100,
    "time_end_ms": 56100,
    "description": "User clicks into the 'Study title' input field and selects the default text.",
    "confidence": 0.8,
    "interaction_target": "Study title",
    "frame_description": "The text 'Askable Product Team - 026 - 12 participants' in the title field is highlighted."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user deletes the selected default title and, after a brief pause, types in a new title for the study.",
    "type": "input_text",
    "time_start_ms": 57900,
    "time_end_ms": 73500,
    "description": "User deletes the default study title and types 'TV Streaming - Discovery'.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "interaction_target": "Study title",
    "frame_description": "The title field is cleared and then the new text 'TV Streaming - Discovery' is entered character by character."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "After entering the title, the user moves the cursor to the 'Next' button and clicks it to move to the next step of the setup process. This is confirmed by the cursor tracking data showing movement in this area.",
    "type": "click",
    "time_start_ms": 77600,
    "time_end_ms": 77600,
    "description": "User clicks the 'Next' button.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "interaction_target": "Next",
    "frame_description": "The cursor moves to and clicks the 'Next' button located below the title input field."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The application begins navigating to the next section of the study setup, which is the 'Research method' step.",
    "type": "navigate",
    "time_start_ms": 77700,
    "time_end_ms": 78894,
    "description": "Page navigates to the 'Research method' step of the study setup.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "frame_description": "The page content changes to show options for research methods like 'Video Call' and 'In-person'."
  }
]
